Client.title: Client
Client.description: Represents a registered guest/client of the motel.

isVip.description: Indicates if the client is a VIP.

visitCount.description: Total number of visits to the motel.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the client was registered.

Reservation.title: Reservation
Reservation.description: Represents a future booking for a room.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Reservation entity.

roomId.description: Reference to the Room being reserved.

roomType.description: Denormalized room type name for display.

guestId.description: Reference to the UserProfile of the guest, if available.

checkInDate.description: The expected check-in date and time.

checkOutDate.description: The expected check-out date and time.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the reservation was created.

Room.title: Room
Room.description: Represents a room in the motel.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Room entity.

status.description: The current status of the room (e.g., available, occupied, out of service).

type.description: Denormalized name of the RoomType. Kept for compatibility.

description.description: Description of the room, based on RoomType features.

ratePerHour.description: Hourly rate, based on RoomType price plans.

Service.title: Service
Service.description: Represents a service offered by the motel (e.g., food, drinks).

id.description: Unique identifier for the Service entity.

name.description: The name of the service (e.g., bottled water, sandwich).

quantity.description: The current available quantity of the service

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents an order for services placed for a room.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

orderTime.description: The date and time the order was placed.

status.description: The status of the order (e.g., pending, processing, completed).

totalPrice.description: The total price of the order.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Represents a transaction for a room stay and services.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Transaction entity.

checkInTime.description: The date and time the room was checked in.

checkOutTime.description: The date and time the room was checked out.

totalAmount.description: The total amount for the transaction.

orderIds.description: References to Orders associated with the transaction. (Relationship: Transaction 1:N Order)

Stay.title: Stay
Stay.description: Represents an active or past stay of a guest in a room.

checkOutReason.description: The reason for an early checkout.

checkOutNotes.description: Additional notes about the early checkout.

renewalCount.description: The number of times the stay has been extended.

extensionHistory.description: A history of all extensions applied to this stay.

StayExtension.title: Stay Extension
StayExtension.description: Records an instance of a stay being extended.

extendedAt.description: Timestamp of when the extension was processed.

oldExpectedCheckOut.description: The checkout time before this extension.

newExpectedCheckOut.description: The new checkout time after this extension.

planName.description: The name of the price plan used for this extension.

planPrice.description: The price of the plan used for this extension.

roles_admin.title: roles_admin
roles_admin.description: Defines admin roles for users. The existence of a document with a user's UID grants them admin privileges.

admin.description: Must be true to grant admin access.

PricePlan.title: Price Plan
PricePlan.description: Defines a pricing plan based on duration.

name.description: Name of the price plan (e.g., Nightly Rate).

duration.description: The value for the duration unit (e.g., 8 for 8 hours).

unit.description: The unit of time for the duration.

RoomType.title: Room Type
RoomType.description: Defines a category of room with specific features and pricing.

name.description: The name of the room type (e.g., Single, Double, Suite).

code.description: A unique code for the room type (e.g., 01, 02).

capacity.description: Maximum number of occupants for this room type.

features.description: A list of features for this room type.

pricePlans.description: A list of pricing plans for this room type.

uid.description: User's unique ID from Firebase Auth.

whatsappNumber.description: User's WhatsApp number, if different from phone.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the profile was created.

role.description: The user's role in the application.

status.description: The current status of the user's account.

photoURL.description: URL of the user's profile picture.

definition.description: Stores information about rooms. Requires admin privileges to create, read, update, or delete.

params.name: roomId
params.description: The unique identifier of the room.

definition.description: Stores information about services offered. Requires admin privileges to create, read, update, or delete.

params.name: serviceId
params.description: The unique identifier of the service.

definition.description: Stores information about orders. Requires admin privileges to create, read, update, or delete. Includes `roomId` to associate orders with rooms.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique identifier of the order.

definition.description: Stores information about transactions. Requires admin privileges to create, read, update, or delete. Includes `roomId` to associate transactions with rooms, and `orderIds` to associate transactions with orders.

params.name: transactionId
params.description: The unique identifier of the transaction.

definition.description: Grants admin access to a user if a document with their UID exists in this collection. Existence over content.

params.name: uid
params.description: The Firebase UID of the user.

definition.description: Stores information about the types of rooms available.

params.name: roomTypeId
params.description: The unique identifier for the room type.

definition.description: Stores user profile information. Users can create and manage their own profile. Admins can manage all profiles.

params.name: userId
params.description: The Firebase UID of the user.

definition.description: Stores reservation information. Requires admin or reception privileges to manage.

params.name: reservationId
params.description: The unique identifier of the reservation.

definition.description: Stores records of room stays, both active and past.

params.name: stayId
params.description: The unique identifier of the stay.

definition.description: Stores registered client information for faster check-ins and CRM.

params.name: clientId
params.description: The unique identifier of the client.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore data structure is designed to manage a motel's operations, including room check-in/out, service orders, inventory, and billing. The structure prioritizes authorization independence and supports secure list operations.

**Authorization Independence and QAPs:**

*   Path-based ownership is used for private user data (none in the current data model, but can be easily extended). This avoids the need for `get()` calls in security rules and enables atomic operations.
*   Since all the collections requires Admin privileges, no additional attributes are denormalized as no user-level authorization rules are needed, simplifying security rules and improving performance.
*   Structural segregation ensures all documents in each collection share the same security requirements (admin-only access).  This simplifies security rules.

**Explanation of Collections:**

*   `/rooms`: Stores room information. All operations require admin privileges.
*   `/services`: Stores service information. All operations require admin privileges.
*   `/orders`: Stores order information. All operations require admin privileges. Includes `roomId` to associate orders with rooms.
*   `/transactions`: Stores transaction information. All operations require admin privileges. Includes `roomId` to associate transactions with rooms, and `orderIds` to associate transactions with orders.
*   `/roles_admin/{uid}`: Used to grant admin access. The existence of a document in this collection grants admin privileges to the corresponding user.

This design enables robust security rules. For example, listing rooms is secure because no user-generated content is involved. All write operations are restricted to admins, which can be enforced by checking the existence of a document in `/roles_admin/{uid}`.
